title: Polyamine Pathway Modulation in 2D Monoculture
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"eg6oj","text":"To investigate the effects of polyamine pathway modulation using spermidine and AMXT-1501 on cell growth and protein expression in 2D monoculture cell systems.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"20l3t","text":"Handle all reagents and materials according to safety data sheets. Use personal protective equipment (PPE) including gloves and lab coats. Work with DMSO and spermidine in a fume hood to avoid inhalation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text:
{"blocks":[{"key":"2b5dr","text":"Cell Culture Plates (6-well plates) - 6 plates
Growth Media (DMEM supplemented with 10% FBS and antibiotics) - 30 mL
Sterile Water (For preparing spermidine stock) - 10 mL
DMSO (For preparing AMXT-1501 stock) - 10 mL

Reagents:
Polyamine Spermidine - A polyamine involved in cellular growth and function
Inhibitor AMXT-1501 - A compound used to modulate polyamine metabolism","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Culture cells in standard 2D monoculture conditions using appropriate growth media.
Prepare spermidine and AMXT-1501 treatments. For spermidine: Prepare stock in water at a 10mM stock in DMEM. For AMXT-1501: Prepare stock in DMSO at 10mM.
Replace existing media in wells with treatment media (spermidine or AMXT-1501). Control wells should receive equivalent volumes of vehicle (water for spermidine; DMSO for AMXT-1501).
Refresh media containing treatments every other day for the duration of the experiment. Ensure to maintain the same treatment concentrations.
creator: Elena Coccia
